title: ferray-core: backing DType variants for fixed-width strings (FixedAscii, FixedUnicode, RawBytes)
description: Follow-up from #734. The npy dtype parser now recognises numpy S20 / U10 / V8 descriptors and rejects load with a specific diagnostic, but ferray-core has no DType variants to actually hold the values. Add DType::FixedAscii(usize), DType::FixedUnicode(usize) (codepoint count → 4*n bytes UCS-4), DType::RawBytes(usize); update size_of, alignment, Display, and the Element-trait machinery. Then wire ferray-io to load these into Vec<u8>/Vec<u32>/Vec<u8> arrays.
